description:
学习一下 /btw 的实现机制。

因为 claude code agent 采用的是经典的 ReAct（Reasoning and Acting）单循环。所以我很好奇这个 /btw 是如何在 单 loop 中优雅实现的。

以下内容是通过结合Piebald-AI 逆向工程项目、OutSight AI 的 MITM 代理分析，以及claude code 官方文档整理而来。

---

/btw 在不破坏 claude code 单 Loop 简洁性的前提下，通过"降级调用"（无工具、单次响应）实现轻量级的侧信道交互。

该功能最早在 2025 年 12 月前后出现在二进制中（约 v2.0.73），经过多版本迭代后于 2026 年 3 月正式完善，现已在官方文档中有明确说明。

根据 Claude Code 官方文档（code.claude.com/docs），/btw 被明确定位为 sub-agent 的"逆运算"：

/btw is the inverse of a subagent: it sees your full conversation but has no tools, while a subagent has full tools but starts with an empty context.

主 Loop 是"有上下文 + 有工具"的完整 Agent；/btw 和 sub-agent 分别是它在两个维度上的降维投影。

三者形成了一个完整的能力矩阵。

我主要是在想，/btw 实现机制是什么样的，才不会破坏 kv 缓存。

Claude Code 使用一套统一的 `<system-reminder>` XML 标签机制来动态修改模型行为。这不是 /btw 独有的，而是一个被约 40 个不同功能共用的基础设施（包括 Plan Mode、文件修改通知、Token 用量提醒等）。

根据 OutSight AI 通过 LiteLLM 代理拦截实际 API 调用的分析，system reminder 是作为 user 角色消息中的额外 text content block 注入的，而不是修改 system prompt。

结合官方文档确认"Claude cannot read files, run commands, or search when answering a side question"，工具禁用很可能采用了双重保险策略：

API 层： 通过设置 tool_choice: "none" 或省略 tools 数组，从 API 层面彻底阻断工具调用
Prompt 层： System reminder 中明确指示"you have NO tools available"，从模型行为层面强化约束

正常情况下 Claude Code 提供 18 个内置工具（Bash、Read、Write、Edit、MultiEdit、Glob、Grep、LS、WebFetch、TodoRead、TodoWrite、Task 等），在 btw 调用中全部被禁用。

/btw 不是在主 loop 中"插队"，而是发起了一个独立的 API 调用。主任务继续处理，btw 的调用并行执行。这解释了为什么它能在 Claude 还在工作的时候响应 side question。

/btw 的问答以可关闭的 overlay 形式展示，绝不写入主对话的 messages 数组。这意味着主任务恢复时，对话状态和 btw 之前完全一样，没有任何上下文污染。

由于 btw 调用复用了主对话的完整历史作为上下文，而 system prompt 和前面的对话 turn 都不变，只有最后一条 user message 是新的，因此前缀部分自然命中缓存。额外成本仅为 172 tokens 的 system reminder + 用户问题 + 模型响应。

用户按 Space、Enter 或 Escape 关闭 overlay 并返回主提示符。整个交互在终端的叠加层中完成，不影响底层的主对话流。

由于 btw 的问答完全不写入主对话历史，主任务恢复时发送的 messages 数组和 btw 之前完全一致。因此，主对话的 prompt cache 零损耗。这是整个设计中最优雅的部分。

Thariq (@trq212)

We just added /btw to Claude Code!

Use it to have side chain conversations while Claude is working.


Video

— https://nitter.net/trq212/status/2031506296697131352#m
title: 客服响应时效优化后，用户满意度怎么变化

# 工作流写作风格约束

## 目标
- 解决一个具体工作问题
- 给出可直接执行的步骤
- 让读者看完就能照做

## 写法约束
- 开头必须出现：问题/代价/变化三者之一
- 中段强调动作链，不强制固定小标题
- 必须出现可验证结果（速度、返工、稳定性、转化等）
- 结尾给出适用边界（何时可用、何时不建议）

## 禁止
- 空泛观点
- 只讲概念不讲动作
- 每篇都使用同一段落骨架

description:
Everyone keeps saying the AI race is about bigger models.

More parameters.
More data.
More compute.

That has been the playbook for the last two years.

But when I looked at OpenAI’s new release this week, one detail caught my attention.

OpenAI introduced 𝐆𝐏𝐓-𝟓.𝟒, its latest frontier model.

And alongside it, two modes:

→ 𝐏𝐫𝐨
→ 𝐓𝐡𝐢𝐧𝐤𝐢𝐧𝐠

The name may sound like marketing.

But it signals something interesting.

For most of the generative AI era, models were optimized for speed.

Ask a question.
Get an answer instantly.

Now the system can pause, reason through multiple steps, and even let you interrupt the response mid-generation to redirect it.

Under the hood, GPT-5.4 combines the coding strength of GPT-5.3 Codex, coordinates across tools like spreadsheets, presentations, and documents, and supports up to 𝟏 𝐦𝐢𝐥𝐥𝐢𝐨𝐧 tokens of context.

It can even interact directly with software.

Which hints at a bigger transition.

Early generative AI was excellent at producing content.

But models like this are starting to move toward executing work.

→ chatbots answer questions
→ reasoning systems solve tasks

→ AI tools generate outputs
→ AI agents operate inside software

In other words:

AI is slowly moving from chatbots to digital coworkers.

And that raises a practical question.

If an AI can navigate software, maintain long context, and execute tasks across tools…

would you trust it to run work across your computer?

#AI #ArtificialIntelligence #OpenAI #Automation #FutureOfWork
title: 模板复用失败的根因：上下文缺失

## 禁止

- 每篇都使用同一段落骨架

description:
𝗖𝗹𝗮𝘂𝗱𝗲 𝗔𝗜 𝗶𝘀 𝗾𝘂𝗶𝗲𝘁𝗹𝘆 𝗺𝗼𝘃𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗶𝗻𝘁𝗼 𝘁𝗵𝗲 𝗲𝗻𝘁𝗲𝗿𝗽𝗿𝗶𝘀𝗲.

This week, 𝗠𝗶𝗰𝗿𝗼𝘀𝗼𝗳𝘁 introduced 𝗖𝗼𝗽𝗶𝗹𝗼𝘁 𝗖𝗼𝘄𝗼𝗿𝗸, a new 𝗮𝘂𝘁𝗼𝗻𝗼𝗺𝗼𝘂𝘀 𝗔𝗜 𝗮𝗴𝗲𝗻𝘁 designed to work across the entire 𝗠𝗶𝗰𝗿𝗼𝘀𝗼𝗳𝘁 𝟯𝟲𝟱 environment. The system can 𝗽𝗹𝗮𝗻 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗲𝘅𝗲𝗰𝘂𝘁𝗲 𝗺𝘂𝗹𝘁𝗶 𝘀𝘁𝗲𝗽 𝗼𝗳𝗳𝗶𝗰𝗲 𝘄𝗼𝗿𝗸𝗳𝗹𝗼𝘄𝘀 across Outlook, Excel, PowerPoint, Teams, and other core applications.

The interesting detail is the technology powering it.

The 𝗼𝗿𝗰𝗵𝗲𝘀𝘁𝗿𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗹𝗮𝘆𝗲𝗿 behind the system is built on 𝗖𝗹𝗮𝘂𝗱𝗲, the AI developed by 𝗔𝗻𝘁𝗵𝗿𝗼𝗽𝗶𝗰, rather than the models from Microsoft’s long time partner 𝗢𝗽𝗲𝗻𝗔𝗜.

The concept is simple.

Instead of using software step by step, users describe the 𝗼𝘂𝘁𝗰𝗼𝗺𝗲 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘆 𝘄𝗮𝗻𝘁.

For example:

“Create a briefing for tomorrow’s leadership meeting.”

The system then handles the process in the background.

• Collects relevant documents and emails
• Extracts key insights and metrics
• Builds presentation slides
• Schedules preparation time
• Drafts summaries for the leadership team

The shift here is significant.

Traditional 𝗯𝘂𝘀𝗶𝗻𝗲𝘀𝘀 𝘀𝗼𝗳𝘁𝘄𝗮𝗿𝗲 required humans to operate each step of a workflow. Open a tool. Complete a task. Move to another application. Coordinate the process manually.

𝗖𝗼𝗽𝗶𝗹𝗼𝘁 𝗖𝗼𝘄𝗼𝗿𝗸 represents a different model.

Software that 𝘂𝗻𝗱𝗲𝗿𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗻𝗱𝘀 𝗮 𝗴𝗼𝗮𝗹 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗲𝘅𝗲𝗰𝘂𝘁𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗵𝗲 𝘄𝗼𝗿𝗸 required to achieve it.

𝗪𝗵𝘆 𝘁𝗵𝗶𝘀 𝗺𝗮𝘁𝘁𝗲𝗿𝘀:

→ 𝗠𝗮𝘀𝘀𝗶𝘃𝗲 𝗱𝗶𝘀𝘁𝗿𝗶𝗯𝘂𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻

𝗠𝗶𝗰𝗿𝗼𝘀𝗼𝗳𝘁 𝟯𝟲𝟱 has hundreds of millions of users. 𝗖𝗼𝗽𝗶𝗹𝗼𝘁 already has more than 15 million paid users and is deployed across a large share of 𝗙𝗼𝗿𝘁𝘂𝗻𝗲 𝟱𝟬𝟬 companies.

→ 𝗘𝗻𝘁𝗲𝗿𝗽𝗿𝗶𝘀𝗲 𝘁𝗿𝘂𝘀𝘁 𝗹𝗮𝘆𝗲𝗿

𝗖𝗹𝗮𝘂𝗱𝗲’𝘀 agent capabilities are wrapped inside Microsoft’s 𝗲𝗻𝘁𝗲𝗿𝗽𝗿𝗶𝘀𝗲 𝗶𝗻𝗳𝗿𝗮𝘀𝘁𝗿𝘂𝗰𝘁𝘂𝗿𝗲, including compliance, governance, audit logs, and identity systems.

→ 𝗦𝘁𝗿𝗮𝘁𝗲𝗴𝗶𝗰 𝘀𝗶𝗴𝗻𝗮𝗹

Microsoft still maintains a deep partnership with 𝗢𝗽𝗲𝗻𝗔𝗜. Yet the system responsible for 𝗲𝘅𝗲𝗰𝘂𝘁𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗹𝗼𝗻𝗴 𝗵𝗼𝗿𝗶𝘇𝗼𝗻 𝘄𝗼𝗿𝗸𝗳𝗹𝗼𝘄𝘀 now relies on 𝗔𝗻𝘁𝗵𝗿𝗼𝗽𝗶𝗰 technology.

→ 𝗔 𝗽𝗼𝘄𝗲𝗿𝗳𝘂𝗹 𝗹𝗲𝗮𝗿𝗻𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗹𝗼𝗼𝗽

Every workflow completed by 𝗖𝗼𝗽𝗶𝗹𝗼𝘁 produces data about how 𝗿𝗲𝗮𝗹 𝗼𝗿𝗴𝗮𝗻𝗶𝘇𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝘀 operate. That feedback can continuously improve the system.

The larger shift is becoming clearer.

The next phase of software is not just 𝘀𝗺𝗮𝗿𝘁𝗲𝗿 𝗰𝗵𝗮𝘁 𝗶𝗻𝘁𝗲𝗿𝗳𝗮𝗰𝗲𝘀.

It is 𝘀𝗼𝗳𝘁𝘄𝗮𝗿𝗲 𝘁𝗵𝗮𝘁 𝗽𝗹𝗮𝗻𝘀, 𝗰𝗼𝗼𝗿𝗱𝗶𝗻𝗮𝘁𝗲𝘀, 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗲𝘅𝗲𝗰𝘂𝘁𝗲𝘀 𝗸𝗻𝗼𝘄𝗹𝗲𝗱𝗴𝗲 𝘄𝗼𝗿𝗸.

In other words, the transition from 𝗔𝗜 𝘁𝗼𝗼𝗹𝘀 to 𝗔𝗜 𝗰𝗼𝘄𝗼𝗿𝗸𝗲𝗿𝘀 is already underway.

How ready is your organization for 𝗱𝗶𝗴𝗶𝘁𝗮𝗹 𝗰𝗼𝘄𝗼𝗿𝗸𝗲𝗿𝘀?

#AI #FutureOfWork #ArtificialIntelligence #DigitalTransformation #Automation
title: 销售跟进话术如何用AI做首稿+人工质检
